intended_use: syngo.via RT Image Suite is a 3D and 4D image visualization, multi-modality manipulation and contouring tool that helps the preparation and response assessment of treatments such as, but not limited t
intended_use_full: syngo.via RT Image Suite is a 3D and 4D image visualization, multi-modality manipulation and contouring tool that helps the preparation and response assessment of treatments such as, but not limited to those performed with radiation (for example, Brachytherapy, Particle Therapy, External Beam Radiation Therapy). It provides tools to efficiently view existing contours, create, edit, modify, copy contours of regions of the body, such as but not limited to, skin outline, targets and organs-at-risk.
target_condition: Radiation therapy treatment planning for cancer and other conditions requiring radiotherapy
ground_truth: Manually annotated ground truth for organ segmentation validated using Average Symmetric Surface Distance (ASSD) and DICE coefficient overlap measures
other_metrics: Mean Average Symmetric Surface Distance (ASSD) ranged 0.64 mm (Femur Head Right) to 3.04 mm (Heart); Mean DICE coefficient ranged 0.85 (Prostate and Rectum) to 0.97 (Heart); Detection rate 100% for Brain, Liver, Kidney Left, and Kidney Right organs-at-risk
